trending_videos.title: Black Clover Second Season | Official Trailer 3 | Crunchyroll
trending_videos.description:
A new saga begins! Black Clover Second Season is coming to Crunchyroll in 2026! Watch Black Clover on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-bcpv

In a world where magic is everything, Asta and Yuno are both found abandoned at a church on the same day. While Yuno is gifted with exceptional magical powers, Asta is the only one in this world without any. At the age of fifteen, both receive grimoires, magic books that amplify their holder’s magic. Asta’s is a rare Grimoire of Anti-Magic that negates and repels his opponent’s spells. Being opposite but good rivals, Yuno and Asta are ready for the hardest of challenges to achieve their common dream: to be the Wizard King. Giving up is never an option!

ABOUT CRUNCHYROLL
Crunchyroll is the place to watch all your favorite anime! Stream new anime, full episodes, movies, OVAs, music, openings, endings, trailers and all the best moments in anime, subbed and dubbed!

▶ WATCH FULL ANIME EPISODES ON YOUTUBE: https://got.cr/cc-pt

🔶 GET YOUR FREE 7-DAY CRU

trending_videos.title: HLE vs G2 | MSI 2026 |  Bracket Stage Day 3
trending_videos.description:
CALL YOUR SHOT.

The International Competition is ramping up with MSI 2026 in Daejeon, South Korea, at the Daejeon Convention Center.  The Play-In Stage features a 4-team, double-elimination bracket, which qualifies one team into the Bracket Stage— where they will compete against seven other teams. 

To learn more about the MSI format, check out https://riot.com/4o3QR9r

Play-Ins: June 28 - July 1
Bracket Stage: July 3-6 & 8-12
Upper Final: July 9
Lower Final: July 11
Grand Final: July 12

Follow LoL Esports to stay up to date with the best of #MSI2026 and competitive League of Legends Esports around the world:

Web: http://lolesports.com

use_of_trailers.description: Several videos are official trailers or pre-release content, indicating a trend towards using teasers to build anticipation.
use_of_trailers.insight: Channels benefit from releasing trailers and teasers to maximize engagement ahead of full releases.

live and interactive content.description: Live events and interactive content are featured, showing a trend in real-time viewer engagement.
live and interactive content.insight: Creators can capitalize on live streaming and interactive formats to boost real-time engagement and viewer retention.

emerging_categories.opportunity: Expand anime-related content, capitalizing on a global audience that consumes subtitled or dubbed content.
Develop content formats that incorporate audience participation, such as games or challenges, to tap into the growing demand for interactive experiences.

strategic_recommendations.recommendation: Collaborate with major franchises to release exclusive content or behind-the-scenes footage, leveraging existing fan bases for cross-promotion.
Invest in live streaming technologies and platforms to offer real-time content, engaging viewers through interactive features and live chats.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
